rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KOR WAI OWYANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Set Aside Judgment For Final Distribution And Order Terminating Trust For Extrinsic Fraud
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/28/2024 (no earlier date available). 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. A copy of the proposed order must be served on each person entitled to notice. A proof of service must be filed as a separate document (and not as an attachment to the proposed order). LRSF 14.7(A)(4). 2) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form. 3) Notice of errata filed on 08/28/2024 must be refiled as a verified supplement. 4) A copy of the opposition was only served electronically according to the proof of service, but no consent to electronic service (EFS-005-CV form) is on file.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JOSEFA NAMIAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Trustee'S First Account In The New Trust Case
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SARAH ANNE LUM
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/25/2024, as the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 07/10/2024) remain unaddressed: 1) No original will has been filed. 2) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 3) No DE-147 form is on file. 4) No DE-147S form is on file. A pleading cover sheet must be attached to this form. 5) No DE-121 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 6) The box was not checked in the petition caption to request IAEA authority. 7) Item 2d of the petition: As Shari Lum is not a California resident, a declaration required by LRSF 14.16(F) must be filed to state the total amount of anticipated liabilities of the decedent and claims against the estate and describe such liabilities and claims. A minimum bond ($20,000) will be required for Shari Lum regardless of a bond waiver provision in the will. See also Probate Code section 8571 & CRC 7.201(b). 8) Items 6f and 7a must be unchecked if the decedent was survived by issue. 9) Item 8: i) Are both petitioners the co-trustees and only beneficiaries of the devisee trust? ii) Please provide the date of death of Dwight Lum. iii) Are both petitioners Dwight Lum's children? iv) If Dwight Lum survived the decedent, his personal representative must be identified and receive notice. Please also provide a copy of letters issued to the personal representative. If there is no personal representative, each person who is entitled to succeed to Dwight Lum's estate must be identified and receive notice: A) If he died intestate, please identify all heirs including his surviving spouse or registered domestic partner if any. B) If he died testate, please identify all devisees named in his will. 10) The will refers to "Jennifer" Lum, but the petition was signed by "Jenifer" Lum. Please confirm the correct spelling of her first name. Note: An appearance may be required on 11/25/2024 for the Court to consider whether to take this petition off calendar, unless papers showing satisfactory progress to address the issues are filed.
